¬∑ Completa las misiones diarias y semanales para obtener incre√≠bles recompensas.
¬∑ Juega diferentes eventos todas las semanas.
¬∑ Aprende las diferentes t√©cnicas de batalla al mirar los mejores duelos en TV Royale.

¬°ATENCI√ďN! 
Clash Royale es absolutamente gratis para jugar y disfrutar, sin embargo, algunos objetos dentro del juego tambi√©n pueden ser comprados con dinero real. Si no deseas usar esta opci√≥n dentro del juego, por favor desactiva las compras dentro del juego en las opciones de compra dentro de tu dispositivo. Tambi√©n, bajo nuestros T√©rminos de Servicio y Pol√≠tica de Privacidad, debes tener por lo menos 13 a√Īos para jugar o descargar Clash Royale. Una conexi√≥n al internet es tambi√©n requerida para poder jugar.

¬∑ Aprende las diferentes t√©cnicas de batalla al mirar los mejores duelos en TV Royale.

¬°ATENCI√ďN!

snippet.title: Vanuatu, el pa√≠s inexplicable
snippet.description:
Vanuatu resulta un pa√≠s fascinante para conocer realidades que pueden ser muy lejanas a nuestra cotidianidad. Se trata de un pa√≠s ubicado en la regi√≥n de Melanesia, en Ocean√≠a, que se independiz√≥ en 1980 de Francia y del Reino Unido. 

Por las dificultades econ√≥micas que atraves√≥ desarroll√≥ un sistema de venta de pasaportes para extranjeros. Aquellos que lo adquieran, con muy pocos requerimientos, podr√°n viajar sin visado a otros 130 Estados soberanos. Aunque no es nada econ√≥mico: hay que desembolsar 150.000 d√≥lares. 

Pero lo m√°s sorprendente es el desarrollo que tuvieron los llamados cultos cargo. Se trata de un sistema de creencias en el que se veneran a sociedades m√°s avanzadas. Tuvo su auge en la Segunda Guerra Mundial, cuando se produjo un choque cultural entre sociedades agrarias y las naciones m√°s avanzadas de la √©poca. A partir de all√≠, los vanuatuenses construyen aviones de paja e imitan los movimientos de los militares, ya que creen que as√≠ los dioses les enviar√°n alimentos y bienes materiales. 

Quienes viajen a Vanuatu tambi√©n podr√°n ser testigos del lugar en el que surgi√≥ el bungee jumping, ya que es una costumbre ancestral en la isla Pentecost√©s.

en.title: Vanuatu, the inexplicable country
en.description:
Vanuatu is a fascinating country to discover realities that can be very far from our daily lives. It is a country located in the Melanesia region, in Oceania, which became independent in 1980 from France and the United Kingdom.

Due to the economic difficulties it went through, it developed a system for the sale of passports for foreigners. Those who acquire it, with very few requirements, will be able to travel without a visa to another 130 sovereign states. Although it is not cheap: you have to pay $ 150,000.

But the most surprising thing is the development of the so-called cargo cults. It is a belief system in which more advanced societies are worshiped. It had its peak in World War II, when there was a cultural clash between agrarian societies and the most advanced nations of the time. From there, the Vanuatuans build straw planes and imitate the movements of the military, since they believe that this way the gods will send them food and material goods.

Those traveling to Vanuatu will also be able to witness where bungee jumping originated, as it is an ancient custom on Pentecost Island.

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) ‚Äď our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceX‚Äôs site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ‚Äď approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship‚Äôs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10‚Äôs Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX‚Äôs third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: Apex Legends Chaos Theory Collection Event Trailer
snippet.description:
Beat the heat in the Chaos Theory Collection Event!  Ring Flares are everywhere in Ring Fury Takeover and Caustic's plotting something in his Town Takeover. Plus collect 24 fearsome items!  http://x.ea.com/67416

Mad Maggie is back to shake things up and this time she has sabotaged the Ring. Ring flares are now showing up across the Apex Games in the new Ring Fury Takeover. But don't fret - you'll drop in with the new Heat Shield in your Survival inventory slot so you can withstand Ring damage and recover with your squad. Become a test subject in a twisted experiment and brave the gas for gold-tier loot in Caustic's Town Takeover. Earn free rewards throughout the event and shop for 24 limited-time event items. Get all 24 event items and receive Bangalore's "Cold Steel" Heirloom. Ready to embrace the chaos?

Apex Legends‚ĄĘ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation¬ģ 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Origin and Steam.  Apex Legends is also coming to the Nintendo Switch on March 9, 2021. 

Learn more about Apex Legends Season 8 ‚Äď Mayhem: http://x.ea.com/67416
 
Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710.
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/playapex.
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/.

snippet.title: State of Play | February 25, 2021 [ENGLISH]
snippet.description:
Rated RP - T, THIS LIVE STREAM MAY INCLUDE CONTENT INAPPROPRIATE FOR CHILDREN
 
This Thursday, State of Play will serve up new updates and deep dives for 10 games coming to PS4 and PS5. The show is clocking it at 30 minutes or so, give or take.
Get ready for new game announcements and updates on some of the third-party and indie titles you last saw in June‚Äôs PS5 showcase.
 
And a quick note: there won‚Äôt be PlayStation hardware or business-focused updates in this show. We‚Äôre focusing on great games set to come out in the months ahead.
 
Be sure to tune in on Thursday, February 25 at 2:00pm Pacific Time / 5:00pm Eastern Time / 10:00pm GMT!


#StateofPlay #PS5 #PlayStation
